defect: cotter pin omitted on castle nut
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Suspension & steering, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: cotter pin omitted on castle nut. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: OEM, alignment specs.
title: Fault diagnosis: Suspension & steering (production floor)
